module-7-clean-student-records.label: Pwojè Modil: Netwaye Dosye Etidyan
module-7-clean-student-records.summary: Fè grandi yon ti pwogram netwayaj ki soti nan yon apèsi fichye brit pou vin yon fichye rezilta netwaye ki ka pataje.

sketch0.title: Yon dosye etidyan dezòdone rive nan bwat resepsyon ou.

mp_3.title: Sote ranje ki pa bon yo epi kolekte anrejistreman yo.

mp-1-read-student-file.title: Li dosye elèv la
mp-1-read-student-file.prompt: Yon gwoup etidyan te voye yon imèl ba ou nan adr`data/students.csv`, epi yo mande sa ki ladan l. Li fichye a epi enprime chak ranje brit san liy vid anplis pou ou ka enspekte done yo anvan ou netwaye yo.
mp-1-read-student-file.hint: Ouvri fichye a, fè yon bouk sou chak liy, epi enprime liy ki dekole a.

help.concept: Yon bon travay netwayaj anjeneral kòmanse pa enspekte fichye brit la anvan ou chanje anyen.
help.hint_2: Anndan bouk la, enprime `line.strip()` pou evite liy vid anplis.

mp-1-read-student-file.starterCode: # Read data/students.csv and print every line without extra blank lines.

0.message: Li data/students.csv olye pou w tape kontni fichye a.

mp-2-clean-one-row.title: Netwaye epi valide yon ranje
mp-2-clean-one-row.prompt: Kòmanse ak apèsi fichye RAW ou deja bati a. Kenbe kontèks sa a, epi ajoute yon liy pou kreye yon diksyonè ak non netwaye ak yon nòt antye. Li premye liy lan ankò epi enprime diksyonè netwaye a.
mp-2-clean-one-row.hint: Konsève fòm fichye a jan li abitye: defini yon èd, epi reitilize fichye a pou teste l sou premye ranje a.

help.concept: Yon fonksyon netwayaj bay rès pwogram nan yon fòm serye pou chak ranje ki valab.
help.hint_2: Retounen `{"name": ..., "score": ...}` ak yon non an majiskil tit ak yon nòt antye.

mp-2-clean-one-row.starterCode:
with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    for line in file:
        print(line.strip())

# Keep the raw-file preview above as your starting point.
# Next, write clean_row(line) so one row becomes a cleaned dictionary.
def clean_row(line):
    # Split the row, clean the name, and convert the score to int.
    pass

with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    first_row = file.readline()

# Print the cleaned first row dictionary.
print(clean_row(first_row))

mp-3-skip-bad-rows.title: Sote ranje ki pa bon yo epi kolekte anrejistreman yo.
mp-3-skip-bad-rows.prompt: Kenbe `clean_row(line)` ki soti nan dènye etap la. Kounye a, kreye yon lis ki rele `records` pa fè yon bouk sou fichye a, ajoute ranje ki valab apre yo fin netwaye, epi sote ranje `ValueError` pou netwayè a ka kontinye avanse.
mp-3-skip-bad-rows.hint: Re-itilize `clean_row(line)` anndan bouk la olye pou w netwaye moso yo ankò ak men.

help.concept: Nan fichye done reyèl yo, gen kèk liy ki kase. Yon netwayè ta dwe kenbe bon liy yo epi pase san pwoblèm sou liy ki pa bon yo.
help.hint_2: Ajoute andedan `try`, epi sote `ValueError` ranje nan `except`.

0.message: Sèvi ak try/except pou sote ran move yo.

mp-4-write-clean-records.title: Ekri dosye pwòp
mp-4-write-clean-records.prompt: Kòmanse ak builder dosye ki deja netwaye ou genyen an. Kenbe lojik sa a, epi ekri ranje ki valab yo nan tablo rezilta a epi ranplase enprime apèsi a ak yon mesaj kout sou konklizyon an.
mp-4-write-clean-records.hint: Tounen lis `records` k ap mache a an yon fichye pou delivre ak yon konfimasyon rapid.

help.concept: Dènye etap nan yon travay netwayaj se delivre yon atik pwòp, pa sèlman enprime done sou ekran an.
help.hint_1: Kreye `output/` si sa nesesè, epi louvri `output/clean_students.csv` an mòd ekriti.
help.hint_2: Ekri yon dosye pwòp pa liy, epi enprime konbyen dosye pwòp ki te sove.

1.message: Sèvi ak file.write() pou kreye fichye CSV sòti a.

try-module-7-clean-student-records-sketc.title: Netwaye premye ranje a nan fichye a
try-module-7-clean-student-records-sketc.prompt: Ouvri `data/students.csv`, li premye liy la, netwaye non an ak nòt la, epi enprime `Ava:92`.
try-module-7-clean-student-records-sketc.hint: Li premye liy ki nan fichye a, separe l, netwaye tou de moso yo, epi enprime yo ak yon pwen-virg.

help.concept: Kat sa a pratike netwaye yon ranje reyèl nan menm fòm fichye ki itilize nan pwojè a.
help.hint_1: Itilize `with open("data/students.csv") as file:` ak `first_row = file.readline()`.
help.hint_2: Separe ranje a, itilize `.strip().title()` pou non an, epi enprime `name:score`.

try-module-7-clean-student-records-sketc.starterCode:
with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    first_row = file.readline()

# Clean the first row and print Ava:92.
try-module-7-clean-student-records-sketc.solutionCode:
with open("data/students.csv") as file:
    first_row = file.readline()

name, score = first_row.split(",")
print(f"{name.strip().title()}:{score.strip()}")

1.message: Separe ranje a an non ak nòt.

2.message: Retire espas vid nan non an ak nòt la.

3.message: Mete non etidyan an an tit.

try_module_7_clean_student_records_sketc.title: Eseye l poukont ou
try_module_7_clean_student_records_sketc.prompt: Ouvri `data/students.csv`, li premye liy la, netwaye non an ak nòt la, epi enprime `Ava:92`.

sketch-1.title: Yon dosye etidyan dezòdone rive nan bwat resepsyon ou.
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
Yon gwoup etidyan ekspòte yon fichye ki gen non ak nòt, men kèk liy dezòdone e kèk kase. Yo pa bezwen yon leson sou netwayaj done; yo bezwen yon ti zouti Python ki li fichye a, kenbe bon anrejistreman yo, sote move yo, epi ekri yon bagay ki itil.

Pwojè modil sa a grandi yon pa atantif alafwa. Chak demaraj se solisyon kanonik anvan an plis pwochen travay reyalis la.
